title: Your photo collection
lead: See the photos from the event, and save them in the way that works best for your device.
empty: There are no photos to show yet.
photoLimit: You can save up to 20 photos at a time to your device.
maxSelected: You can select up to 20 photos at a time.
desktopHint: ZIP download is best on a computer.
mobileHint: Select photos and save them through your device's share menu.
desktopFlowHint: Download the full photo collection as a ZIP.
iosZipNote: downloads the full collection. On iPhone the file is saved in Files, usually under Downloads. You can also select up to 20 photos at a time and save them directly on your device.
androidZipNote: downloads the full collection. On Android the file is usually saved in Downloads. You can also select up to 20 photos at a time and save them directly on your device.
shareFallback: Your browser cannot share files here. The gallery link was copied instead.
shareError: Could not share the photos. Try fewer photos or click Download ZIP.
savedPromptTitle: Did you get the photos saved?
savedPromptMessage: If you chose “Save images” in the share menu, we can mark them as saved on this device.
savedStatus: {count} photos marked as saved on this device.
